title: Decision No 1/2021 of the Specialised Committee established by Article 8(1)(p) of the Trade and Cooperation Agreement between the European Union and the European Atomic Energy Community, of the one part, and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, of the other part, of 29 October 2021 as regards the Amendment of the Annexes to the Protocol on Social Security Coordination
subject: SOCIAL SECURITY
